sqlMap.select: select * from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetail where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetail(VersionSequence, PolicyKey InsuranceCompanyKey LimitAmount DeductibleAmount PolicyExpirationDatePross ProInsPremium IsClaimExpLiability PriorActDatePross IsPerClaim IsPriorActDateFull FirmYear InsuranceCompanyPILKeyOthers InsuranceCompanyNamePross LimitSequencePross DeductibleSequencePross ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #InsuranceCompanyKey# #LimitAmount# #DeductibleAmount# #PolicyExpirationDatePross# #ProInsPremium# #IsClaimExpLiability# #PriorActDatePross# #IsPerClaim# #IsPriorActDateFull# #FirmYear# #InsuranceCompanyPILKeyOthers# #InsuranceCompanyNamePross# #LimitSequencePross# #DeductibleSequencePross# )
sqlMap.select: select InsuranceCompanyKey, LimitAmount, DeductibleAmount, PolicyExpirationDatePross, ProInsPremium, IsClaimExpLiability, PriorActDatePross, IsPerClaim, IsPriorActDateFull, FirmYear, InsuranceCompanyPILKeyOthers, InsuranceCompanyNamePross, LimitSequencePross, DeductibleSequencePross, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetail where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetail set
InsuranceCompanyKey = #InsuranceCompanyKey# InsuranceCompanyKey = null LimitAmount = #LimitAmount# LimitAmount = null DeductibleAmount = #DeductibleAmount# DeductibleAmount = null PolicyExpirationDatePross = #PolicyExpirationDatePross# PolicyExpirationDatePross = null ProInsPremium = #ProInsPremium# ProInsPremium = null IsClaimExpLiability = #IsClaimExpLiability# IsClaimExpLiability = null PriorActDatePross = #PriorActDatePross# PriorActDatePross = null IsPerClaim = #IsPerClaim# IsPerClaim = null IsPriorActDateFull = #IsPriorActDateFull# IsPriorActDateFull = null FirmYear = #FirmYear# FirmYear = null InsuranceCompanyPILKeyOthers = #InsuranceCompanyPILKeyOthers# InsuranceCompanyPILKeyOthers = null InsuranceCompanyNamePross = #InsuranceCompanyNamePross# InsuranceCompanyNamePross = null LimitSequencePross = #LimitSequencePross# LimitSequencePross = null DeductibleSequencePross = #DeductibleSequencePross# DeductibleSequencePross = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetail where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetail where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select InsuranceCompanyKey, LimitAmount, DeductibleAmount, PolicyExpirationDatePross, ProInsPremium, IsClaimExpLiability, PriorActDatePross, IsPerClaim, IsPriorActDateFull, FirmYear, InsuranceCompanyPILKeyOthers, InsuranceCompanyNamePross, LimitSequencePross, DeductibleSequencePross, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetail where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, InsuranceCompanyKey, LimitAmount, DeductibleAmount, PolicyExpirationDatePross, ProInsPremium, IsClaimExpLiability, PriorActDatePross, IsPerClaim, IsPriorActDateFull, FirmYear, InsuranceCompanyPILKeyOthers, InsuranceCompanyNamePross, LimitSequencePross, DeductibleSequencePross from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetail where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
